targets.query:
from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "m_pv_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 24.0 / 1000.0 }))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "PV kWh/pv")

from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "p1_meter_energian_tuonti")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Osto")

from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "p1_meter_energian_vienti")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Myynti")

from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: today(), stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "m_spot_price_eur_kwh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "€/kWh")

buy_kwh = from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "m_buy_price_eur_kwh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

grid_buy = from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "m_grid_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value > 0.0 then r._value else 0.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {price: buy_kwh, power: grid_buy}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value_price * r._value_power / 1000.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Ostokustannus")

from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "m_spot_price_eur_kwh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Spot €/kWh")

from(bucket: "energyhub")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "m_spot_price_eur_kwh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] < 0.0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Negatiivinen hinta")
